final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a gothic castle interior with towering vaulted ceilings.

Style/medium: photorealistic digital painting, dark gothic horror aesthetic, inspired by classic Hammer horror films and medieval cathedral architecture
Composition: wide-angle interior shot looking upward toward the vaulted ceiling, dramatic forced perspective emphasizing scale and height
Subject: gothic castle interior with soaring ribbed vaults, pointed arches, massive stone columns
Scene/backdrop: medieval castle great hall, towering stone walls, ornate architectural details
Lighting/mood: blood-red light streaming through stained glass windows, heavy shadows pooling in corners, candlelight from wrought-iron candelabras creating flickering highlights, oppressive and mysterious atmosphere
Color palette: deep blacks and charcoal grays as base, blood-red as dominant accent, warm amber candlelight highlights, desaturated stone textures
Materials/textures: rough-hewn stone walls, polished marble floors, wrought iron chains and candelabras, leaded stained glass with crimson panes, aged wood beams
Avoid: bright daylight, cheerful colors, modern elements, clean minimalist aesthetic, 8K stuffer words
